About Me

Who I Am

My name is Aliya Pratiwi, and I am an enthusiastic IT learner with a strong interest in technology and problem solving. I enjoy exploring how systems work and finding efficient solutions to technical issues.

I have a solid understanding of fundamental IT concepts, including system operations, basic programming logic, and IT support practices. I continuously improve my technical knowledge to stay updated with current technology trends.

I am committed to continuous learning and eager to grow in the IT field. My goal is to build a professional career where I can contribute my skills and provide reliable technical support to individuals and organizations.
